limitations: AI investment intensity scored 3 rather than 4-5: the $10B data center investment figure is for general data center capacity, not AI-specific capex; no AI-dedicated budget or spend is separately quantified

AI narrative concreteness scored 2: AI is discussed only as a demand driver for DLR's data center business, not as a named internal initiative or deployed use case; language is aspirational and market-framing

AI risk disclosure scored 3: two named risk categories are present (AI-enabled cyber threats, workforce/business impact of AI prevalence), but mechanisms linking these risks to specific revenue or operational impacts are not elaborated; no quantification or named governance body for AI risk
